episodes.title: Sen. Myrie talks N.Y. bill allowing Epstein victims to seek damages from estate | Inside City Hall
episodes.description:
Four women, who allege they were sexually abused by Jeffrey Epstein as minors, testified before the New York Senate’s Codes Committee in support of a bill that would alter the state’s sex trafficking laws to allow victims to seek punitive damages from the estates of abusers who have died. Brooklyn state Sen. Zellnor Myrie joined “Inside City Hall” to discuss the testimony and what the bill would mean for victims of sexual abuse.

#NY1 #NYC #News #politics #albany #jeffreyepstein
